headline: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release dominates the cycle, with educators reviewing its capabilities, agent features, and benchmark numbers.
body: Cyril Imhof leads coverage of Claude Fable 5, framing it as a distinct model with a Know Your Agent (KYA) feature [0] and reviewing its fit for regulated industries alongside context engineering and design patterns for long running agents [1]. Chase AI reports the Mythos model family ships with Fable 5, which it describes as Mythos 5 with guardrails, available at no extra cost on Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22 before shifting to usage credits [7][10]. Anthropic's own demos show Fable 5 autonomously playing Factorio [11], deriving planetary orbits from first principles to predict a solar eclipse [12], and generating both a fluid simulation and a Beethoven EDM remix in code [13]. Better Stack rounds out the recommended set with a self hosted, API driven NotebookLM alternative called Open Notebook [2], a Chipotle promotion hack for free Claude coding [3], and an Instagram AI flaw that let users request account access directly [4].
